verified.title: Wholesale 5D Faux Mink Lashes Handmade Luxurious Volume Fluffy Natural False Eyelashes
verified.description: Handmade 5D faux mink strip lash with dense, layered fluffy volume fanning out from a thin clear/black band. Tiered wholesale pricing shown directly on the manufacturer's made-in-china.com storefront.
verified.supplier_name: Qingdao Phylyan International Trading Co., Ltd.
verified.cost_source_moq: Tiered pricing on listing: $2.80/pair at lowest tier, $2.50/pair mid tier, $1.90/pair at highest volume tier; MOQ 1 pair
verified.quality_differentiator: 5D handmade fluffy volume construction from a real named Qingdao manufacturer with published wholesale price tiers (not "contact for pricing") and a verified clean, watermark-free product photo on white background.
verified.verification_evidence: made-in-china.com listing page loaded via WebFetch confirmed supplier name, tiered price ($2.80/$2.50/$1.90), MOQ 1 pair. Image URL curl-checked HTTP 200, downloaded and visually inspected (converted webp->png) — clean product-only photo, no text/watermark/logo.

partially_verified.verification_evidence: WebFetch of product page confirmed materials and certifications but explicitly states 'No specific pricing, per-unit cost, or MOQ listed on this page' — site requires direct contact/quote request.
